rule: replace each disallowed char [^A-Za-z0-9_-] with one '-' per UTF-16 code unit (1 for BMP, 2 for astral/supplementary-plane chars like emoji — matches the non-`u` TS regex /[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/g), then ASCII-lowercase, then trim leading/trailing '-'. Internal '-' runs are preserved. Empty result returned empty; caller applies a per-token fallback.
